The '''Great Dome of the Je'har''' was a building in [[Stonia]], [[Almania]] and was the headquarters of the [[Je'har]] regime. [[Kueller]] destroyed it when he overthrew the Je'har. He used the rubble to make his new regime's headquarters.

{{Struct-stub}}
